Created page with "'''Kokushi Daijiten''' (国史大辞典) is a [[historical dictionary]] of [[Japanese history]] published by [[Yoshikawa Kōbunkan]] during the [[Meiji era]] and [[Shōwa era]] in two separate editions. * For the first Japanese historical dictionary compiled by {{ill|Kuniharu Yashiro|ja|八代国治}} and others in [[1908]], see '''{{ill|Kokushi Daijiten (Meiji era)|ja|国史大辞典 (明治時代)}}'''. * For the largest Japanese historical dictionary compiled by {{il..."
revision.text:
'''Kokushi Daijiten''' (国史大辞典) is a [[historical dictionary]] of [[Japanese history]] published by [[Yoshikawa Kōbunkan]] during the [[Meiji era]] and [[Shōwa era]] in two separate editions.
* For the first Japanese historical dictionary compiled by {{ill|Kuniharu Yashiro|ja|八代国治}} and others in [[1908]], see '''{{ill|Kokushi Daijiten (Meiji era)|ja|国史大辞典 (明治時代)}}'''. * For the largest Japanese historical dictionary compiled by {{ill|Tarō Sakamoto (historian)|ja|坂本太郎 (歴史学者)}} and others between [[1979]] and [[1997]], see '''{{ill|Kokushi Daijiten (Shōwa era)|ja|国史大辞典 (昭和時代)}}'''.
{{Ambiguous}} [[Category:Japanese history books]] [[Category:Dictionaries]] [[Category:Yoshikawa Kōbunkan books]] [[ja:国史大辞典]]

'''Kokushi Daijiten''' (国史大辞典) is a [[historical dictionary]] of [[Japanese history]] published by [[Yoshikawa Kōbunkan]] during the [[Meiji era]] and [[Shōwa era]] in two separate editions.
* For the first Japanese historical dictionary compiled by {{ill|Kuniharu Yashiro|ja|八代国治}} and others in [[1908]], see '''{{ill|Kokushi Daijiten (Meiji era)|ja|国史大辞典 (明治時代)}}'''. * For the largest Japanese historical dictionary compiled by {{ill|Tarō Sakamoto (historian)|ja|坂本太郎 (歴史学者)}} and others between [[1979]] and [[1997]], see '''{{ill|Kokushi Daijiten (Shōwa era)|ja|国史大辞典 (昭和時代)}}'''.
{{Ambiguous}} [[Category:Japanese history books]] [[Category:Dictionaries]] [[Category:Yoshikawa Kōbunkan books]] [[Category:newer pages]][[ja:国史大辞典]]

'''Kokushi Daijiten''' (国史大辞典) is a [[historical dictionary]] of [[Japanese history]] published by [[Yoshikawa Kōbunkan]] during the [[Meiji era]] and [[Shōwa era]] in two separate editions.
* For the first Japanese historical dictionary compiled by {{ill|Kuniharu Yashiro|ja|八代国治}} and others in [[1908]], see '''{{ill|Kokushi Daijiten (Meiji era)|ja|国史大辞典 (明治時代)}}'''. * For the largest Japanese historical dictionary compiled by {{ill|Tarō Sakamoto (historian)|ja|坂本太郎 (歴史学者)}} and others between [[1979]] and [[1997]], see '''{{ill|Kokushi Daijiten (Shōwa era)|ja|国史大辞典 (昭和時代)}}'''.
{{Ambiguous}} [[Category:Japanese history books]] [[Category:Dictionaries]] [[Category:Yoshikawa Kōbunkan books]] [[Category:newer pages]][[Category:newer pages]][[ja:国史大辞典]]

revision.text:
'''Kokushi Daijiten''' (国史大辞典) is a [[historical dictionary]] of [[Japanese history]] published by [[Yoshikawa Kōbunkan]] during the [[Meiji era]] and [[Shōwa era]] in two separate editions.
* For the first Japanese historical dictionary compiled by {{ill|Kuniharu Yashiro|ja|八代国治}} and others in [[1908]], see '''{{ill|Kokushi Daijiten (Meiji era)|ja|国史大辞典 (明治時代)}}'''. * For the largest Japanese historical dictionary compiled by {{ill|Tarō Sakamoto (historian)|ja|坂本太郎 (歴史学者)}} and others between [[1979]] and [[1997]], see '''{{ill|Kokushi Daijiten (Shōwa era)|ja|国史大辞典 (昭和時代)}}'''.

'''Kokushi Daijiten''' (国史大辞典) is a [[historical dictionary]] of [[Japanese history]] published by [[Yoshikawa Kōbunkan]] during the [[Meiji era]] and [[Shōwa era]] in two separate editions.
* For the first Japanese historical dictionary compiled by {{ill|Kuniharu Yashiro|ja|八代国治}} and others in [[1908]], see '''{{ill|Kokushi Daijiten (Meiji era)|ja|国史大辞典 (明治時代)}}'''. * For the largest Japanese historical dictionary compiled by {{ill|Tarō Sakamoto (historian)|ja|坂本太郎 (歴史学者)}} and others between [[1979]] and [[1997]], see '''{{ill|Kokushi Daijiten (Shōwa era)|ja|国史大辞典 (昭和時代)}}'''.

'''Kokushi Daijiten''' (国史大辞典) is a [[historical dictionary]] of [[Japanese history]] published by [[Yoshikawa Kōbunkan]] during the [[Meiji era]] and [[Shōwa era]] in two separate editions.
* For the first Japanese historical dictionary compiled by {{ill|Kuniharu Yashiro|ja|八代国治}} and others in [[1908]], see '''{{ill|Kokushi Daijiten (Meiji era)|ja|国史大辞典 (明治時代)}}'''. * For the largest Japanese historical dictionary compiled by {{ill|Tarō Sakamoto (historian)|ja|坂本太郎 (歴史学者)}} and others between [[1979]] and [[1997]], see '''{{ill|Kokushi Daijiten (Shōwa era)|ja|国史大辞典 (昭和時代)}}'''.

revision.text:
'''Kokushi Daijiten''' (国史大辞典) is a [[historical dictionary]] of [[Japanese history]] published by [[Yoshikawa Kōbunkan]] during the [[Meiji era]] and [[Shōwa era]] in two separate editions.
* For the first Japanese historical dictionary compiled by {{ill|Kuniharu Yashiro|ja|八代国治|12=draft}} and others in [[1908]], see '''{{ill|Kokushi Daijiten (Meiji era)|ja|国史大辞典 (明治時代)|12=draft}}'''. * For the largest Japanese historical dictionary compiled by {{ill|Tarō Sakamoto (historian)|ja|坂本太郎 (歴史学者)|12=draft}} and others between [[1979]] and [[1997]], see '''{{ill|Kokushi Daijiten (Shōwa era)|ja|国史大辞典 (昭和時代)|12=draft}}'''.

* For the first Japanese historical dictionary compiled by {{ill|Kuniharu Yashiro|ja|八代国治|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kuniharu Yashiro|qq=|1=Kuniji Yashiro|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11390510}} and others in [[:en:1908|1908]], see '''{{ill|Kokushi Daijiten (Meiji era)|ja|国史大辞典 (明治時代)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kokushi Daijiten (Meiji era)|qq=|1=Kokushi Daijiten|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11420602}}'''.

* For the first Japanese historical dictionary compiled by {{ill|Kuniharu Yashiro|ja|八代国治|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kuniharu Yashiro|1=Kuniji Yashiro|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11390510}} and others in [[:en:1908|1908]], see '''{{ill|Kokushi Daijiten (Meiji era)|ja|国史大辞典 (明治時代)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kokushi Daijiten (Meiji era)|1=Kokushi Daijiten|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11420602}}'''. * For the largest Japanese historical dictionary compiled by {{ill|Tarō Sakamoto (historian)|ja|坂本太郎 (歴史学者)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tarō Sakamoto (historian)|1=Tarō Sakamoto|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11425253}} and others between [[:en:1979|1979]] and [[:en:1997|1997]], see '''[[:en:Kokushi Daijiten|Kokushi Daijiten (Shōwa era)]]'''.

* For the first Japanese historical dictionary compiled by {{ill|Kuniharu Yashiro|ja|八代国治|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kuniharu Yashiro|1=Kuniji Yashiro|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11390510}} and others in {{ill|1908|en|1908|WD=Q2056|lt=1908}}, see '''{{ill|Kokushi Daijiten (Meiji era)|ja|国史大辞典 (明治時代)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kokushi Daijiten (Meiji era)|1=Kokushi Daijiten|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11420602}}'''. * For the largest Japanese historical dictionary compiled by {{ill|Tarō Sakamoto (historian)|ja|坂本太郎 (歴史学者)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tarō Sakamoto (historian)|1=Tarō Sakamoto|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11425253}} and others between {{ill|1979|en|1979|WD=Q2484|lt=1979}} and {{ill|1997|en|1997|WD=Q2088|lt=1997}}, see '''{{ill|Kokushi Daijiten|en|Kokushi Daijiten|WD=Q11420603|lt=Kokushi Daijiten (Shōwa era)}}'''.
{{disambiguation}}
